Name: CIS Controls v8 - Vercel
Description: CIS Controls v8 mapping for Vercel provider checks. Maps Vercel security checks to CIS Controls for establishing a secure baseline configuration.

Requirements.Name: 3.3 Configure Data Access Control Lists
Requirements.Description: Configure data access control lists based on a user's need to know. Apply data access control lists, also known as access permissions, to local and remote file systems, databases, and applications.

Requirements.Name: 4.1 Establish and Maintain a Secure Configuration Process
Requirements.Description: Establish and maintain a secure configuration process for enterprise assets (end-user devices, including portable and mobile, non-computing/IoT devices, and servers) and software (operating systems and applications).

Attributes.Section: 4 - Secure Configuration of Enterprise Assets and Software

Requirements.Name: 5.4 Restrict Administrator Privileges to Dedicated Administrator Accounts
Requirements.Description: Restrict administrator privileges to dedicated administrator accounts on enterprise assets. Conduct general computing activities, such as internet browsing, email, and productivity suite use, from the user's primary, non-privileged account.

Requirements.Name: 6.3 Require MFA for Externally-Exposed Applications
Requirements.Description: Require all externally-exposed enterprise or third-party applications to enforce MFA, where supported. Enforcing MFA through a directory service or SSO provider is a satisfactory implementation of this Safeguard.

Requirements.Name: 6.5 Require MFA for Administrative Access
Requirements.Description: Require MFA for all administrative access accounts, where supported, on all enterprise assets, whether managed on-site or through a third-party provider.

Requirements.Name: 13.6 Deploy a WAF
Requirements.Description: Deploy a WAF in front of all web applications and configure to block common web application attacks.

Requirements.Name: 9.4 Protect Recovery Data with Strong Encryption
Requirements.Description: Ensure that recovery data is stored using strong encryption.
